title: Strength SMP
description: A competitive Minecraft PvP plugin built around a dynamic strength progression system, custom weapon abilities, and high-stakes player bounties.
body:
# ⚔️ StrengthSMP | Ultimate Class PvP System

**StrengthSMP** is the ultimate high-performance PvP system for competitive servers. Roll a custom class, scale your damage with active strength, unlock custom active abilities, and soul-bind your gear.

* **🚀 Universal Support:** Run natively on **1.16.5 - 1.21.4+** (Spigot, Paper, Purpur).
* **⚡ Ultra-Lightweight:** Packaged jar size is just **275KB**.
* **🔌 Zero Dependencies:** Async Discord audit logs and announcement webhooks built-in.

---

## ⚡ Overview

```
[ Roll Reroll Book ] ──> [ Unlock 1 of 6 Class Weapons ]
                                 │
   ┌─────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────┐
   ▼                             ▼                             ▼
[ PASSIVE DAMAGE SCALING ]    [ ACTIVE ABILITY ]            [ BOUND ACTIVE ABILITY ]
Weapon damage scales          Right-click weapon to         Press F or Q on a bound
from -10% to +25% based       trigger basic active          weapon to trigger special
on your active strength.      combat abilities.             Bound Active Abilities.
```

---

### 📦 Custom 3D Items & Particles (Included Resource Pack)

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bed2b23cc62873fd95ae03c36db515e82b5b00b4.png)

Every custom item features **stunning, live-updating particle effects** in your hand and inventory:
* 🌟 **Strength Orb:** Swirls with golden fire sparks that radiate power.
* 🔮 **Reroll Book:** Surrounded by floating purple magical runes and dark particles.
* 📜 **Death Certificate:** A premium dark document with a glowing blood-red wax skull seal.

---

## 🛡️ Weapon Classes & Custom Abilities Reference

Your class weapon damage scales directly with your current **Active Strength level**:
* `0 STR` = **85%** damage | `1 STR` = **95%** | `2 STR` = **100%** | `3 STR` = **110%** | `4 STR` = **118%** | `5 STR (MAX)` = **125%**

### 1. 🌟 Active Abilities (Right-Click)
*Triggered by holding your matching class weapon and **Right-Clicking** (or shooting for Crossbow).*

| Class / Weapon | Active Ability | What It Does | Cooldown |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 🗡️ **Assassin (Sword)** | **Blink** | Teleports you forward up to 5 blocks in the direction you look (checks safely for walls). | 30s |
| 🪓 **Juggernaut (Axe)** | **Ground Pound** | Slams the floor, creating an explosion that knocks up nearby enemies and deals 10.0 damage. | 25s |
| 🛡️ **Tank (Shield)** | **Reflect** | Actively reflects 100% of all incoming damage taken back to the attacker for 7 seconds. | 40s |
| 🏹 **Archer (Bow)** | **Explosive Shot** | Primes your next arrow to explode on impact, dealing knockback and 6.0 area damage. | 30s |
| 🦂 **Scorpion (Crossbow)** | **Rapid Fire** | On arrow hit, unleashes a high-speed automatic volley of 6 critical arrows. | 25s |
| 🔱 **Gladiator (Trident)** | **Gladiator Riptide** | Launches you forward at high speed, damaging all entities in your flight path (melee only). | 15s |

---

### 2. 🔒 Bound Active Abilities (F or Q Keys)
*To use these, run `/bind` and spend **1 Strength** to bind your weapon to your soul (bound weapons are kept on death and fly back to your hand on respawn). Trigger by pressing **F** (Swap hand) or **Q** (Drop weapon).*

| Class / Weapon | Bound Active Ability | What It Does |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 🗡️ **Assassin (Sword)** | **Excalibur Beam** | Fires a slicing crescent wave of golden sparks forward 12 blocks, piercing and launching enemies. |
| 🪓 **Juggernaut (Axe)** | **Dimensional Cleave** | Creates a spatial rift 3.5 blocks ahead that vacuums nearby entities for 2s, then implodes. |
| 🛡️ **Tank (Shield)** | **Shield Forcefield** | Releases an expanding electric ring (6-block) knocking back all enemies and applying Slow II. |
| 🏹 **Archer (Bow)** | **Gravity Singularity** | Launches a gravity arrow creating a center vortex on impact that pulls all entities. |
| 🦂 **Scorpion (Crossbow)** | **Scorpion Hook** | Fires a high-velocity hook dragging hit targets directly to your feet and stuns them. |
| 🔱 **Gladiator (Trident)** | **Poseidon Riptide** | Propels you forward at extreme velocity with aqua trails, damaging all hit targets. |

---

### 3. 👑 Passive Stats & Command Ultimates

| Class / Weapon | Passive Combat Stats | Command Ultimate (`/ability`) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 🗡️ **Assassin (Sword)** | **Bleed:** 15% chance to apply Wither II for 3 seconds on hit. Melee damage scales with Strength. | **Berserk:** Gain Speed III and +2.0 flat attack damage for 15s (30s cooldown). |
| 🪓 **Juggernaut (Axe)** | **Shield Disable:** 10% chance to break shields. Stuns targets on hit if strength >= 1. | *Automatic / Passive* |
| 🛡️ **Tank (Shield)** | **Damage Reduction:** 50% flat damage reduction while holding shield (not blocking). | **Resistance:** Gain Resistance II for 5 seconds (40s cooldown). |
| 🏹 **Archer (Bow)** | **Homing Arrow:** 25% chance for arrows to automatically track target. | *Automatic / Passive* |
| 🦂 **Scorpion (Crossbow)** | **Armor Piercing:** Crossbow shots ignore 100% of target's physical armor. | *Automatic / Passive* |
| 🔱 **Gladiator (Trident)** | **Melee Focus:** Melee damage is scaled by strength. Throwing tridents is disabled. | *Automatic / Passive* |

---

## 🪓 Totem Limiter System
Tired of players carrying full inventories of Totems of Undying and dragging out PvP fights forever? StrengthSMP features an advanced **Totem Limiter** system:
* **Configurable Cap:** Limits the total number of totems a player can hold in their possession (including inventory, offhand, armor slots, and cursor).
* **Smart Sanitization:** Any excess totems picked up, dragged, or transferred from containers are instantly blocked or automatically dropped to the ground.
* **Notification System:** Players receive customized alerts when trying to exceed the totem limit.
* **Exploit Protection:** Actively monitors armor stands, merchant inventories, and chest hotkey transfers to prevent bypasses.

---

## 👑 Dynamic Strength Prefix Ranks
Chat prefixes scale up or down automatically based on players' active **Strength level**, creating a highly competitive atmosphere!

#### 🔴 The Powerhouses (High Strength)
* 👑 **`+10 STR` — [Demigod]** (Fiery Gold): The ultimate server champion. Only the elite touch this divine prefix!
* 😈 **`+9 STR` — [Overlord]** (Vibrant Pink): A ruling force that commands respect.
* 🌌 **`+8 STR` — [Grandmaster]** (Dark Purple): A master of unmatched battlefield tactics.
* ⚔️ **`+7 STR` to `+6 STR` — [Conqueror] / [Warlord]** (Dark Red): Relentless conquerors.
* 🏆 **`+5 STR` — [Champion]** (Red): A top-tier PvP legend.
* 🛡️ **`+4 STR` to `+3 STR` — [Veteran] / [Knight]** (Gold & Purple): Honorable high-strength fighters.
* 🗡️ **`+2 STR` to `+1 STR` — [Soldier] / [Initiate]** (Aqua & Pink): Fast-rising contenders.

#### ⚖️ The Neutral Zone (Default)
* ⚪ **` 0 STR` — [Neutral]** (Yellow): The starting point. Every warrior begins their journey here.

#### 💀 The Downward Spiral (Negative Strength)
* 📉 **`-1` to `-3 STR` — [Novice] / [Apprentice] / [Squire]**: Recovering fighters attempting to gain back lost power.
* 🌾 **`-4` to `-6 STR` — [Citizen] / [Vassal] / [Peasant]**: Suffering the heavy toll of multiple combat losses.
* 🪦 **`-10 STR` — [Hopeless]** (Dark Gray): Stripped of all power. These players must fight twice as hard to rise back up!

---

## 🩸 Custom Items & Recipes

### 🌟 Strength Shard
Right-click to redeem for `+1 Strength`.
![strength-item-showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e2258a70261028e61c20158a320ad3f73278ef.png)
![strength-recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22ed879942fb3732cc367571434f160355fbc37b.png)

### 🔮 Reroll Book
Right-click to open the class GUI. Costs 1 Strength point if rerolling.
![reroll-book-showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b9ac9ab90f17b2abc405dbdf2bc54329aef0e47.png)
![reroll-recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14b8cdceccc752b2064b81c5103b188a9a5d8400.jpeg)

---

## 🔒 Weapon Binding & Statistics
Spend **1 Strength** to permanently bind your class weapon to your soul (or swap bound weapons for **1 Strength**). Access this feature using `/bind` to open the custom interface.

![Bind GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da2f135104c461e5be66b7abbc9b21c69115435a.png)

### ✦ Bound Weapon Features:
*   **Keep on Death & Loyalty Return:** If you die, your bound weapon stays on you! A custom spinning Loyalty-style return animation launches the weapon back into your hands, knocking back any intermediate entities.
*   **Undroppable:** Prevents accidental loss by blocking drop inputs (`Q`).
*   **Holding Particle Effects:** Active bound weapons emit elegant magical particles while held.
*   **Advanced Statistics Tracking:** The GUI contains 5 custom tracking grimoires:
    1.  **Souls Harvested:** Tracks PvP kills and lists your recent victims.
    2.  **Damage Dealt:** Tracks total cumulative damage dealt.
    3.  **Soul Sacrifices:** Tracks deaths occurred while holding the weapon.
    4.  **Duration Bound:** Displays elapsed real-time since binding.
    5.  **Ability Triggers:** Counts active class ability uses.

---

## 👑 Monarch & Bounties
*   **Monarch System:** The top killer becomes the Monarch. They receive perks but their location is broadcasted (Configurable).
*   **Bounty System:** Place item-based bounties on players. Rewards are granted automatically upon a successful hit.
![Bounty System](https://i.postimg.cc/B6h1D8yg/bounty-ezgif-com-optimize.gif)

---

## 💻 Commands Reference

### Player Commands
* `/bind` - Open the Soul-Binding menu.
* `/strength` - View your stats and active prefix rank.
* `/withdraw <amount>` - Withdraw active strength into physical shards.
* `/ability` - Trigger weapon's active ultimate buff.

### Admin Commands (`strengthsmp.admin`)
* `/strengthsmp reload` - Reload configs, messages, and webhooks.
* `/strengthsmp setstrength <player> <amount>` - Set player strength.
* `/strengthsmp setweapon <player> <weapon>` - Set player weapon class.
* `/strengthsmp reroll <player>` - Force reroll a player's class.
* `/punish <player>` - Force double strength loss.
* `/notimer <player>` - Toggle newbie/death protection.

---
